# Handheld Settings Lab

Handheld Settings Lab publishes handheld PC game settings, calculators, and gear guides.

Core sections:
- /steam-deck-settings/
- /rog-ally-settings/
- /calculators/
- /guides/

Recent guide:
- /guides/handheld-pc-battery-care-charge-limit-guide/ — spec-informed battery care, charge-limit, USB-C PD, heat, dock, and travel-storage habits for handheld gaming PCs.

Editorial guardrails: do not fabricate benchmark data, test claims, affiliate relationships, or official affiliations.
